note: i.MX8 pedal-assist controller. RideService(IMotor,IPower,IPedalSensor,RideStrategy). Drives motor over SSP serial (SLIP+CRC16/MODBUS, /dev/ttymxc3); CANopen-OD sensors; publishes ride/info/* telemetry. ELF was undisassembled (gap pattern) — app fns created. See main/docs/ride.md.

core (ride_service + main).0x10a1f0: main  // Entry point (main.cpp). getopt CLI parse (-p port=/dev/ttymxc3, -i, -s sim speed, -t assist type); builds SerialTransport->SspProtocol->strategy->MotorSensorOd->RideService->RideApp graph; logs Run Ride / Shutting down Ride / Ride shut down; runs ride_app_run.
core (ride_service + main).0x1106e0: ride_service_ctor  // RideService constructor: installs vtables, inits 3 internal containers (+0x16/+0x1a/+0x1e), stores collaborator ptrs (strategy/motor/power at +0x22..+0x25, +0x29), inits a 300-entry buffer, registers itself as a motor request handler via param_4 vtbl+0x20.
core (ride_service + main).0x112cd0: ride_service_dtor  // RideService destructor: calls publish_telemetry(this,0) to flush a zeroed final frame, tears down lists/containers.
core (ride_service + main).0x11bb00: ride_service_should_enable_motor  // The 5 assist gates. Returns enable = Pedalling && PoweredOn && (gate) ? SufficientSOC : 0. On any gate-state change logs '!!EnableMotor: Pedalling/PoweredOn/Spinning/SufficientSOC/Motor comm running' (ride_service.cpp:0x115).
core (ride_service + main).0x11bd60: ride_service_update_motor_enable  // Computes should_enable_motor and applies it via ride_service_apply_motor_enable.
core (ride_service + main).0x11b560: ride_service_apply_motor_enable  // Under mutex: pushes motor-enable flag (and boost flag when param2) into strategy(+0xb0 vtbl+0x38) and motor-sensor(+0x98 vtbl+0x10); also forwards SOC from power(+0xa0 vtbl+0x38).
core (ride_service + main).0x11bd90: ride_service_set_assist_level  // Setter: validates level 0-4 (else 'Error, invalid assist level' :0x121), forwards to strategy vtbl+0x10, logs 'Assist level: %d' (:0x127). Mutex-guarded.
core (ride_service + main).0x11be80: ride_service_set_region  // Setter: validates region 0-4 (else 'Error, invalid region' :300), forwards to strategy vtbl+0x20. Mutex-guarded.
core (ride_service + main).0x11bf50: ride_service_set_boost_mode  // Setter: stores boost flag at +0x110, logs 'OnBoostModeUpdate: on/off' (:0x137). Mutex-guarded.
core (ride_service + main).0x1129f0: ride_service_publish_telemetry  // Reads motor speed/current(+0x120) + torque/pedal(+0x118), runs motor_assist_filter + motor_current_smooth, builds 3 SSP frames (opcode 0x1e data report, 0xc, 0xe) and enqueues to SSP(+0x110); calls motor_log_status + motor_update_brake_lights.
core (ride_service + main).0x110260: ride_service_publish_motor_versions  // Fetches motor version list from provider(+0x128 vtbl+0x40) and enqueues each entry to SSP(+0x110).
core (ride_service + main).0x11c020: ride_service_compare_motor_versions  // Requests otloader/firmware/vendor version strings, compares to cached globals; on change updates cache and logs 'Motor version information / Bootloader: %s / Firmware: %s / Vendor: %s' (:0x78-0x7b).
core (ride_service + main).0x11b200: ride_app_ctor  // RideApp constructor (main.cpp graph). Inits app, allocates a refcounted callback object, registers 3 MQTT request-managers (templates DAT_0014c600/608/610) bound to motorenable/status/version cb-managers.
core (ride_service + main).0x11b640: ride_app_dtor  // RideApp destructor: unregisters config keys 'st_level'/'s_region', publishes device-info topics (region/firmware/otloader/vendor), releases refcounted callbacks.
core (ride_service + main).0x11bad0: ride_app_delete  // RideApp deleting-destructor thunk: ride_app_dtor + operator delete(0x118).
core (ride_service + main).0x1200e0: ride_app_run  // Subscribes the 3 command/settings MQTT topics: 'settings/assist_level','settings/region','ride/boost' with handlers ride_app_on_assist_level_msg/on_region_msg/on_boost_msg. Mutex-guarded.
core (ride_service + main).0x11d7e0: ride_app_on_assist_level_msg  // MQTT handler for settings/assist_level: parses uint8 payload, calls ride_service_set_assist_level.
core (ride_service + main).0x11d850: ride_app_on_region_msg  // MQTT handler for settings/region: parses uint8 payload, calls ride_service_set_region.
core (ride_service + main).0x11d8c0: ride_app_on_boost_msg  // MQTT handler for ride/boost: parses bool payload, calls ride_service_set_boost_mode.
core (ride_service + main).0x11d930: ride_app_on_motor_status_msg  // MQTT handler for device/motor_control/status: decodes status JSON via motor decoders FUN_00118100/FUN_001188a0 and updates internal motor state.

core (ride_service + main).0x11aae0: ride_app_region_cb_manager  // std::function manager for the settings/region callback (RTTI 0x16ff38).
core (ride_service + main).0x11ab30: ride_app_boost_cb_manager  // std::function manager for the ride/boost callback (RTTI 0x16ff48).
